description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden sideboard or cabinet with a natural light wood finish. The front features three central drawers, each with a small round knob, flanked by two doors with frosted or opaque glass panels and matching knobs. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing decorative items or storage. The sides and back are plain, constructed from the same wood material, with no additional ornamentation. The legs are short and straight, providing stable support and a slight elevation from the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A light wood sideboard with three central drawers and two glass-paneled doors, featuring a minimalist, modern design. The cabinet has a flat top and short legs, with a natural finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers in the center and two glass-paneled doors on either side, each with a round knob.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat wooden panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless wooden back panel, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the plain wooden panel.
